claims.summary: The 48D representation and its legacy 32D boundary should remain explicit.
claims.disposition: Verified representation contracts, lane mapping, and compatibility tests.

claims.summary: Tail vibrancy should turn on smoothly at the 0.85 entropy gate.
claims.disposition: Verified exact-gate, 0.849/0.851, and smoothstep continuity tests.

claims.summary: Reserved dimensions 44-47 must remain unchanged by tail vibrancy.
claims.disposition: Verified reserved-lane parity across high-entropy and exact-gate tests.

claims.summary: High-entropy vibrancy should remain mechanically visible without proving felt continuity.
claims.disposition: Verified read-only vibrancy, substance-fit, and representation-loss evidence.

claims.summary: Vibrancy lift or ceiling should scale dynamically with density gradient.
claims.disposition: Preserved as a Tier 5 codec-gain and live-vector wait.
